sentences.arabic: كَانَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقُ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ مِثَالًا يُحْتَذَى بِهِ فِي التَّضْحِيَةِ وَالْوَفَاءِ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ طَوَالَ حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Abu Bakr as-Siddiq, radijallahu anhu, bio je uzor u žrtvovanju i odanosti Poslaniku, s.a.v.s., tokom cijelog svog života.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr as-Siddiq (may Allah be pleased with him) was an exemplary model of sacrifice and loyalty to the Prophet (PBUH) throughout his life.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا أَذِنَ اللهُ لِلرَّسُولِ بِالْهِجْرَةِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ، اخْتَارَ أَبَا بَكْرٍ لِيَكُونَ رَفِيقَهُ فِي هَذِهِ الرِّحْلَةِ الْمُبَارَكَةِ وَالشَّاقَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada je Allah dozvolio Poslaniku hidžru u Medinu, odabrao je Abu Bakra da mu bude saputnik na tom blagoslovljenom i teškom putovanju.
sentences.translationEn: When Allah permitted the Messenger to migrate to Medina, he chose Abu Bakr to be his companion on this blessed and arduous journey.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ بَذَلَ الصِّدِّيقُ مَالَهُ وَجَهْدَهُ لِحِمَايَةِ النَّبِيِّ، وَأَظْهَرَ شَجَاعَةً عَظِيمَةً حِينَ كَانَا فِي غَارِ ثَوْرٍ.
sentences.translation: As-Siddiq je uložio svoj imetak i trud da zaštiti Poslanika, te je pokazao veliku hrabrost dok su bili u pećini Sevr.
sentences.translationEn: As-Siddiq spent his wealth and effort to protect the Prophet, and he showed great courage while they were in the cave of Thawr.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ ذَكَرَ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي صَحِيحِهِ مَنَاقِبَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَفَضْلَهُ الْعَظِيمَ عَلَى سَائِرِ الصَّحَابَةِ، حَيْثُ كَانَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ آمَنَ مِنَ الرِّجَالِ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ فَضَائِلِ الصَّحَابَةِ].
sentences.translation: Buhari u svom Sahihu spominje odlike Abu Bakra i njegovu veliku prednost nad ostalim ashabima, jer je bio prvi muškarac koji je povjerovao [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o vrlinama ashaba].
sentences.translationEn: Al-Bukhari mentioned in his Sahih the virtues of Abu Bakr and his great precedence over the rest of the Companions, as he was the first man to believe [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Virtues of the Companions].

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَنَا سِيرَتُهُ أَنَّ الصِّدْقَ مَعَ اللهِ يُوصِلُ الْعَبْدَ إِلَى أَعْلَى الْمَرَاتِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Njegova biografija nas uči da iskrenost prema Allahu dovodi roba do najviših stepeni na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: His biography teaches us that sincerity with Allah brings a servant to the highest ranks in this world and the hereafter.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ مَحَبَّةَ الصَّحَابَةِ وَتَوْقِيرَهُمْ جُزْءٌ لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مَنْ عَقِيدَةِ أَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالْجَمَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljubav prema ashabima i njihovo poštovanje su neodvojivi dio akide ehli-sunneta vel-džema'ata.
sentences.translationEn: Loving and honoring the Companions is an integral part of the creed of Ahl al-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah.
